use_cases: Website footer for landing pages providing site navigation and company information
Bottom-of-page navigation with multiple link columns for content discovery
Standard footer with logo, tagline, and legal links for web applications
ai_summary: A responsive multi-column footer component featuring a logo area with tagline, four link group sections (Product, Company, Resources, Social), copyright text, and bottom legal links. Built with Tailwind CSS using a CSS grid layout that adapts from 2 columns on mobile to 6 columns on desktop.
